summary: Comprehensive testing of ULN Quick Win Phase A: Catalog, Distribution Status, and Audit Snapshot features. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Catalog tab shows assets table with seed data, Distribution tab shows summary cards/health bar/endpoints table, Audit Snapshot tab shows download button. Label Switcher and Members tab regression tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints properly implement authentication via get_current_user dependency
Catalog endpoint returns seed data with is_seed_data flag when no real assets exist
Audit snapshot returns Content-Disposition header for file download
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Label Switcher correctly updates all 3 new tabs when switching labels
Seed data badge clearly indicates placeholder data for Phase A
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - endpoints use built-in seed data generation when no real data exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: ULN Catalog, Distribution Status, and Audit Snapshot features fully tested. Backend: All 3 new endpoints working (/labels/{id}/catalog, /labels/{id}/distribution/status, /labels/{id}/audit-snapshot). All return 404 for non-existent labels and 403 for unauthenticated requests. Frontend: Catalog tab shows assets table with Title/Type/Artist/ISRC/Release/Status/Streams columns. Distribution tab shows summary cards (total/live/pending/errors), health bar with percentage, and endpoints table. Audit Snapshot tab shows download button that triggers JSON file download. Label Switcher works with 43 labels. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!

backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{labelId}/catalog: PASS - Returns catalog with assets, total_assets, is_seed_data
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{labelId}/distributi: PASS - Returns endpoints, summary with health_pct
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/labels/{labelId}/audit-snap: PASS - Returns JSON file with Content-Disposition header
backend_endpoints.GET /api/uln/me/labels (regression): PASS - Label switcher endpoint still works

frontend_components.ULN page loads at /uln: PASS - Shows Unified Label Network dashboard
frontend_components.Label Switcher: PASS - Shows 43 labels, switching updates all tabs
frontend_components.Catalog tab: PASS - Shows assets table with 7 columns (Title, Type, Artist, ISRC, Release, Status, Streams)
frontend_components.Catalog seed badge: PASS - Shows 'Sample Data — Real assets will appear after Phase B'
frontend_components.Distribution tab: PASS - Shows summary cards (6 endpoints: 4 live, 1 pending, 1 error)
frontend_components.Distribution health bar: PASS - Shows 66.7% health with color-coded bar
frontend_components.Distribution endpoints table: PASS - Shows Platform, Status, Last Delivery, Assets Delivered, Errors
frontend_components.Audit Snapshot tab: PASS - Shows download button and included sections list

data_validation.Catalog assets have required fields: PASS - title, type, artist, isrc, release_date, status, streams_total
data_validation.Distribution summary has metrics: PASS - total_endpoints, live, pending, error, health_pct
data_validation.Distribution endpoints have fields: PASS - platform, status, last_delivery, assets_delivered, errors
data_validation.Audit snapshot has sections: PASS - snapshot_version, generated_at, label, members, catalog, distribution_endpoints

mocked_data_note: Catalog and Distribution use SEED/PLACEHOLDER data when no real data exists in database. This is by design for Phase A (Quick Win). Real data integration planned for Phase B.
